---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem statement
What problem are you trying to solve? Who does it affect and why is this important?

## Proposal
Describe your proposed feature or change. Be concrete: include API/CLI examples, configuration snippets, or pseudo-code showing how it would be used.

## Motivation and use cases
List the concrete scenarios and users that would benefit.

## Alternatives considered
Describe other approaches you considered and why you prefer this proposal.

## Backwards compatibility & migration
Will this change be backwards compatible? If not, describe migration steps and the expected impact.

## Implementation notes (optional)
If you have suggestions for implementation, tests, or a rough plan and timeline, include them.

## Acceptance criteria
- What must be true for this change to be considered complete?
- Any performance, security, or compatibility constraints?

## Related
Link to related issues, discussions, or RFCs.
